Subject: Job application for Senior Executive Position at Apple Inc.
Dear Hiring Manager,
I am thrilled to apply for the Senior Executive position at Apple Inc., a company renowned for its innovation and
impact on transforming technology into tools that enhance lives. My extensive academic background from
Caltech, University of Manchester, MIT, and Harvard, coupled with over a decade of experience leading
transformative projects, aligns seamlessly with Apple’s mission.
I hold a Bachelor of Science in Electrical Engineering from Caltech University, a Master of Science in Artificial
Intelligence from University of Manchester, a Ph.D. in Computational Neuroscience from MIT, and an MBA from
Harvard Business School. This diverse academic foundation has equipped me with a multidisciplinary
perspective on solving complex challenges.
Professionally, I have led impactful projects across major technology firms: As Senior AI Engineer at Tesla Inc., I
developed advanced machine learning algorithms for autonomous vehicles, improving sensor accuracy and
collaborating with cross-functional teams to enhance vehicle-to-vehicle communication technologies. As AI
Integration Lead at Microsoft Corporation, I spearheaded AI integration into productivity tools, enhancing user
efficiency, and led a team to deliver innovative solutions on time and within budget. Currently, as Director of
AR/VR Development in Meta (Facebook), I lead a team deploying scalable AR/VR solutions, contributing to
significant revenue growth in the Reality Labs division.
In addition, my leadership roles reflect a strong commitment to fostering innovation and collaboration. At
Harvard, I served as President of the Global Tech Leaders Forum, organising symposiums that bridged
academia and industry. At Manchester, I mentored graduate students in AI ethics, emphasising the importance
of responsible innovation. Among my key projects are: Developing an AI-powered diagnostic tool at MIT,
improving global healthcare outcomes. Building a cloud-based education platform utilized across 50 countries,
integrating real-time analytics for student engagement. Designing machine learning models for autonomous
driving at Tesla and optimizing AR/VR applications at Meta.
Apple’s dedication to creating groundbreaking products resonates deeply with my passion for leveraging
technology to address real-world challenges. I am eager to bring my strategic vision, technical expertise, and
leadership acumen to Apple to contribute to its legacy of innovation.
Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how my background and
aspirations align with the impactful work at Apple Inc.
Warm regards,
Aadhithya S R
